summary: Markets show mixed sentiment with US futures steady and AI-driven equity rallies masking inflation risks from elevated oil prices above $105/bbl and rising Treasury yields to 4.39%. Bitcoin remains bullish with strong VWAP signals and net long positions at 1,441 contracts, while EUR/USD faces downside pressure from higher US rates. European indices like DAX gain modestly, but Asian markets weaken amid corporate issues at Samsung.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Multiple videos indicate bullish positioning with squeeze setups and higher targets, but recent dump suggests volatility and potential trap conditions.
signals.chart_pattern: Coiling pattern before breakout, squeeze setup, potential bull trap warning

signals.name: Solana
signals.reason: DegenDave explicitly states 'Balls Deep in SOL' indicating strong bullish conviction with altcoin season thesis.
signals.chart_pattern: Altcoin breakout setup, ready to rip higher

signals.name: Sui
signals.reason: Mentioned alongside SOL as ready to move higher during altcoin season setup before CPI.
signals.chart_pattern: Altcoin breakout setup, ready to rip higher

signals.name: S&P 500
signals.reason: Daily and weekly VWAP bullish with target above 7340 to 7460 amid Wall Street highs despite narrow AI-driven breadth.

signals.name: US Dollar Index
signals.reason: Daily VWAP bullish strengthened across majors with target above 98.85 to 99.50 due to higher Treasury yields.

signals.name: EUR/USD
signals.reason: Daily VWAP bearish with key resistance at 1.18-1.1850 and downside to 1.1680 as US yields jumped.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Weighed down despite geopolitical risks as markets lean into higher-for-longer rates with Dollar strength.

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Back above $105/bbl after Trump rejected Iran proposal, extending Strait of Hormuz disruption and energy-risk premium.

signals.name: Euro Stocks 50
signals.reason: Registered gains of 0.2-0.4% driven by optimism in European equities.

signals.name: DAX
signals.reason: Gains alongside Euro stocks 50 amid regional optimism despite mixed Asia.

signals.name: Nikkei Average
signals.reason: Futures slipped 0.4% following slight fall amid Asian weakness.

signals.name: Kospi
signals.reason: South Korea's Cospi fell over 2% due to halted union negotiations.

signals.name: Samsung Electronics
signals.reason: Shares dropped 5% after union suspended wage talks, sparking investor concerns.

signals.name: Wheat Futures
signals.reason: Surged due to decade-low US harvest estimate signaling future price pressures.

signals.name: Nvidia
signals.reason: Rally heavily concentrated in AI-linked names like NVDA amid Wall Street highs.

signals.name: Nintendo
signals.reason: Near-10% drop on rising chip-cost warnings reminding AI story not universally margin-accretive.

signals.name: 10-Year Treasury Yield
signals.reason: Up 4bp to 4.39% on higher-for-longer rates implication from elevated oil and core services inflation.
